mapper.select: SELECT su.id, su.username, su.nickname, su.system_data, su.data_status, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT sd.dept_name) AS dept_names, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT sr.role_name) AS role_names, su.create_time, su.blacklist_status, sui.user_type, sui.telephone
SELECT t.id, t.username, t.nickname, t.telephone, t.data_status, t.create_time, t1.dept_names, t1.role_names
SELECT su.username, su.nickname, su.data_status, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT sd.dept_name) AS dept_names, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT sr.role_name) AS role_names, sui.telephone
SELECT t.username, t.nickname, t.telephone, t.data_status, t.create_time, t1.dept_names, t1.role_names
